name: capstone-project-team-7
description: Portfolio Analysis System - FastAPI + Next.js + Electron

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w electron
scripts.start:desktop: npm run install:all && npm run dev:desktop
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron "cd backend && python -m uvicorn src.main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd electron && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:3000 ELECTRON_OPEN_DEVTOOLS=0 npm run dev"
scripts.preview:desktop: npm run export --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace electron && cross-env ELECTRON_OPEN_DEVTOOLS=0 npm run start --workspace electron
